{{Quote|I...overheard a group of people calling themselves the Genesis Red talk about sabotaging the lower levels of the station!|[[Ryzer|A bully]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:T" />}}
The '''Genesis Red''' was a criminal organization led by a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] by the name of [[Genesis Red/Legends|Genesis Red]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:GRC" /> Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Genesis Red were among the many criminal gangs that had infested [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. Roaming the lower levels of the station, the Genesis Red were one of the major problems for the authorities of Tansarii Point Station.<ref name="SWG:T" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> the criminals were planning to sabotage Tansarii Point Station. They managed to break through the outer hull of the station, creating a very dangerous situation for its inhabitants.<ref name="SWG:GRC" /> Fortunately, [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] working for [[Rydel Delan]], Tansarii Point's [[Unarmed combat/Legends|brawling]] master, discovered the plot. The spacers therefore headed to the lower level of Tansarii Point Station where they fought the saboteurs and prevented them to achieve their insane project.<ref name="SWG:T" /> The Genesis Red were finally repelled when their leader and a large portion of their number were killed by a group of freelancer hired by the authorities.<ref name="SWG:GRC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Genesis Red appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:T" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Genesis Red were added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
